title: Watch: Australian man goes to Thailand hotel with minor, comes out with her body in suitcase; caught at airport
summary_full: An Australian man, Simon Peter Carman, has been charged with the murder of a 17-year-old Thai girl in Pattaya. Her body was discovered in a suitcase near a railway line. CCTV footage reportedly shows Carman leaving a condominium with the suitcase before abandoning it. He was arrested attempting to flee the country and denies all charges, claiming the girl became 'crazy' and threatened him.
